---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for roff-cli
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is hard or slow to do today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see in roff-cli.

## Why roff-cli?

roff-cli deliberately stays small and only parses/converts man pages. Why does this belong in roff-cli rather than a script?

## Alternatives considered

Any other tools or approaches you've tried.
